name: devkit-workspace
description: Maintainability-first modular rewrite of the CFX DevKit workspace

scripts.image:check:base: docker image inspect ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-base:dev >/dev/null && echo 'ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-base:dev present in local daemon'
scripts.image:check:devcontainer: docker image inspect ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-devcontainer:dev >/dev/null && echo 'ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-devcontainer:dev present in local daemon'
scripts.image:check:code-server: docker image inspect ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-code-server:dev >/dev/null && echo 'ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-code-server:dev present in local daemon'
scripts.image:build:base: pnpm run artifacts:prepare && docker buildx build --load -f packages/devkit-base/Dockerfile -t devkit-base:dev -t ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-base:dev . && docker image inspect ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-base:dev >/dev/null
scripts.image:build:devcontainer: pnpm run image:build:base && docker buildx build --load --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=devkit-base:dev -f targets/devcontainer/Dockerfile -t devkit-devcontainer:dev -t ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-devcontainer:dev . && docker image inspect ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-devcontainer:dev >/dev/null
scripts.image:build:code-server: pnpm run image:build:base && docker buildx build --load --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=devkit-base:dev -f targets/code-server/Dockerfile -t devkit-code-server:dev -t ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-code-server:dev . && docker image inspect ghcr.io/cfxdevkit/devkit-code-server:dev >/dev/null
